top_signals.title: Live updates: Bitcoin drops to $62,600 as some traders peg SpaceX's IPO as 'next catalyst'
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: StoneX Plans to Deepen India Presence Beyond First Trading Desk
top_signals.summary: StoneX Group Inc. plans to expand into base metals and agricultural commodities after setting up its first precious metals trading desk in India in June, according to top executives, deepening its presence in the fast-growing economy after serving it for years from overseas hubs.
